creator: chris@officialunix.com
text:
I would like to request maintainer for the following ports.

ftp/cftp
ftp/cmdftp
ftp/ftpfind
ftp/gproftpd
ftp/proftpd
ftp/proftpd-devel
ftp/pureadmin
games/abuse
games/abuse_sdl
games/tuxracer
games/doom
games/prboom
irc/eggdrop
irc/psybnc
www/analog
www/cherokee
www/dokuwiki
www/dokuwiki-devel

Sorry for the PR's, but I enjoy making ports, and I love to do what I can to make them better. Last PR promise :)
